static_proof.notes: Governance-only lane. No code changes. Grounded in UTV2-848 verified findings: model_attributed_pct=0%, pick_candidates has no model_registry_id column, provenance JSONB has no model reference keys.

verified_facts_used: pick_candidates.provenance has no model reference key (sampled 19792 rows)
no FK from pick_candidates to model_registry found
distinct picks.source values: system-pick-scanner(3621), smart-form(386), board-construction(161), api(28), human(3), canary-proof(2)

sections: Pre-conditions: verified facts from UTV2-848 implementation pass
4. Model Lifecycle States (8 states, allowed/invalid transitions)

summary.root_cause: The model_registry table exists but has no FK from pick_candidates. The provenance JSONB on pick_candidates contains no model reference keys (verified across 19,792 rows). All 3,621 system-pick-scanner picks are heuristic_system under the UTV2-849 classification because no registry link exists. model_attributed_pct = 0% is a hard fact, not an estimate.
summary.resolution: Champion model registry standard written. 9 entity types, 8 lifecycle states, 30+ required fields, champion/challenger policy, attribution contract, and Codex packet complete. The critical migration (pick_candidates.model_registry_id FK) is defined as required but explicitly deferred — it needs operator approval and a separate implementation lane.
summary.migration_description: ADD COLUMN pick_candidates.model_registry_id UUID REFERENCES model_registry(id) — must be added at candidate scoring time, not backfilled to historical rows
